quiz_items.question: When must a Laser Product Report be submitted to CDRH?
options: Prior to introduction of the certified product into commerce
quiz_items.explanation: Manufacturers must submit the Product Report prior to introduction into commerce. CDRH considers delivery to prospective purchasers or trade show exhibition as introduction into commerce.

quiz_items.question: What must be included in a Laser Product Report?
options: Only the product name and model number
Product and labeling description, compliance method, testing program, life testing, and test equipment
quiz_items.explanation: Laser Product Reports describe: reported product and labeling, manner of compliance with standard, testing program, life testing, and test equipment used.
